_doctrine: ZERO-THRESHOLD RULE (ratified 2026-07-18, permeates all identity blueprints): refunds and remedies matching a published, ratified rule execute automatically with the rule cited; ANY remedy beyond published rules, ANY amount, moves only on signed payment.authority.
